tevuori/GithubMonitor.label: Working version
tevuori/GithubMonitor.commitMessage:
feat: add repository backup & revert feature

- backend/src/routes/backup.ts: new /api/backup routes
  - GET  /:owner/:repo/snapshots  – list saved snapshots
  - POST /:owner/:repo/snapshot   – create new snapshot (stores commit SHA + file tree)
  - POST /:owner/:repo/revert     – revert repo to a snapshot (force-push branch to saved SHA)
  - DELETE /:owner/:repo/snapshots/:id – delete a snapshot
- frontend/src/pages/Backup.tsx: full UI page
- frontend/src/App.tsx: added /backup route
- frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: added Backup nav item
- backend/src/index.ts: registered /api/backup route

tevuori/IVSProj2.label: Working before rebase (Unnecceseary merge)
tevuori/IVSProj2.commitMessage:
Merge branch 'hotfix/Expression-Parser-NthRootNotRegistering'

Fix NthRoot (√) parsing in ExpressionParser

Fixes three bugs that caused the √ symbol to fail during expression parsing:

1. "√! was not recognized as a function token because "char.IsLetter('√')"
   returns false. Fixed by adding "c == '√'" to the tokenizer condition.

2. Implicit multiplication was not inserted before "√", so expressions
   like "2√(2,8)" threw an unknown character exception. Fixed by extending
   the implicit multiplication condition.

3. Typo "operatorsRoot" → "operators" in the ArgSeparator case of ToPostfix(),
   which caused a compilation error.

All existing tests pass after these changes.
